case_title: FINLAY PACIFIC, LLC VS. ANGUS CAMERON

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ANGUS CAMERON
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ANGUS CAMERON, 156 2ND STREET, 3RD FLR, S.F. 94105

DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MATTHEW BRASLER--PRINCIPAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINLAY PACIFIC, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMERON, ANGUS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUS CAMERON.
